document.title: What the Fund Does Not Do — UNJSPF Video
document.revision: UNJSPF Video: What Does the Fund Not Do

chunks.part: What the Fund Does Not Do
chunks.heading: Does the UNJSPF provide tax advice?
chunks.text: No. The Fund does not provide tax advice, as tax liabilities depend on individual national legislation in over 190 countries. It recommends consulting local tax authorities or specialists.

chunks.part: What the Fund Does Not Do
chunks.heading: How do I get a statement of pension income for tax purposes?
chunks.text: Submit a one-time written request via the online contact form on the Fund's website. Subsequently, statements are generated automatically each year in your Member Self-Service account.

chunks.part: What the Fund Does Not Do
chunks.heading: Does the Fund provide financial advice?
chunks.text: No. The Fund does not provide financial advice and suggests seeking assistance from a qualified specialist.

chunks.part: What the Fund Does Not Do
chunks.heading: Does the Fund administer After-Service Health Insurance (ASHI)?
chunks.text: No. The Fund does not administer After-Service Health Insurance. Questions regarding ASHI, including monthly premium deductions visible in the Member Self-Service disbursement tab, should be directed to the health insurance section of your former employing organization.

chunks.part: What the Fund Does Not Do
chunks.heading: What else does the Fund not do?
chunks.text: The Fund does not process final pay entitlements, issue retiree/beneficiary ID cards, or manage compensation for service-incurred injuries.
